pc(t,i){const[r,p]=a.useState("all"),[d,v]=a.useState("all"),[I,_]=a.useState(""),[x,R]=a.useState(""),[N,L]=a.useState("all"),[o,w]=a.useState("all"),[h,s]=a.useState("all"),[b,P]=a.useState("all"),B=a.useMemo(()=>{let y=[...t];const V=new Date;if(d==="today"){const n=new Date(V.getFullYear(),V.getMonth(),V.getDate());y=y.filter(G=>new Date(G.date)>=n)}else if(d==="7days"){const n=new Date(V.getTime()-6048e5);y=y.filter(G=>new Date(G.date)>=n)}else if(d==="thismonth"){const n=new Date(V.getFullYear(),V.getMonth(),1);y=y.filter(G=>new Date(G.date)>=n)}else uc(t){const{setVouchers:i,customers:r,suppliers:p,setCustomers:d,setSuppliers:v,showToast:I,language:_,currentUser:x,playBeep:R}=t,[N,L]=a.useState(null),[o,w]=a.useState("RECEIPT"),[h,s]=a.useState("CUSTOMER"),[b,P]=a.useState(""),[B,A]=a.useState(""),[y,V]=a.useState("CASH"),[n,G]=a.useState(""),[W,O]=a.useState(""),[D,K]=a.useState(new i=String(t).replace(/\D/g,"");if(i){const p=Number.parseInt(i,10);if(Number.isFinite(p)&&p>0&&p<2147483647)return p}let r=0;for(const p of String(t))r=(r<<5)-r+p.charCodeAt(0)|0;return Math.abs(r)%1e7+1e3}function Ke(t){return t==null?"":String(t).trim().toUpperCase()}function Ms(t){var v;if(!t)return"";const i=(v=t.notes)==null?void 0:v.match(/#([A-Za-z0-9-_]+)/),r=i?i[1].trim().toUpperCase():"",p=String(t.productId||t.serviceId||"").trim().toUpperCase(),d=String(t.type||"").trim().toUpperCase();return r?`${d}_${r}_${p}_${t.quantity||0}_${t.unitPrice||0}`:Ke(t.id)}function $s(t,i,r){const p=i.trim().toUpperCase();if(!p)return"";const d=x=>{let R=0;for(let N=0;N<x.length;N+=1)R=(R<<5)-R+x.charCodeAt(N)|0;return R},v=Math.abs(d(p)%10);if(!r){const x=t.trim().replace(/\/$/,"");return`${x.startsWith("http")?x:`https://${x}`}/shards/shard${v}/teams/${p}.json`}const fc(t,i){const r=new Map(i.map(v=>[Ke(v.id),v])),p=t.map(v=>r.get(Ke(v.id))||v),d=new Set(t.map(v=>Ke(v.id)));return[...p,...i.filter(v=>!d.has(Ke(v.id)))]}function Ft(t,i){if(!t)return"";const r=i(t),p=[r.importedProducts,r.importedTransactions,r.importedCustomers,r.importedSuppliers,r.importedExpenses,r.importedWarehouses,r.importedVouchers,r.importedInvoices,r.importedServices,r.importedTransfers];let gc(t){const{products:i,categories:r,suppliers:p,transactions:d,customers:v,warehouses:I,transfers:_,expenses:x,teamMembers:R,partners:N,distributions:L,vouchers:o,invoices:w,services:h,chatHistory:s,companyName:b,companyPhone:P,companyAddress:B,setProducts:A,setCategories:y,setSuppliers:V,setTransactions:n,setCustomers:G,setWarehouses:W,setTransfers:O,setExpenses:D,setTeamMembers:K,setPartners:re,setDistributions:pe,setVouchers:U,setInvoices:xe,setServices:J,setChatHistory:m,setCompanyName:fe,setCompanyPhone:ee,setCompanyAddress:c,firebaseUrl:g,teamId:S,cloudSyncType:Z,isAutoSyncEnabled:ue,isLiveMonitoringActive:u,setIsCloudSyncing:E,setLastCloudSyncTime:$,addCloudSyncLog:te,setLiveNotifications:Q,language:q,showToast:C,playBeep:j}=t,f=a.useRef({}),Y=a.useRef(""),z=a.useRef(!1),le=a.useRef(!1),me=a.useRef(null);a.useEffect(()=>{f.current={products:i,categories:r,suppliers:p,transactions:d,customers:v,warehouses:I,transfers:_,expenses:x,teamMembers:R,partners:N,distributions:L,vouchers:o,invoices:w,services:h,chatHistory:s}},[i,r,p,d,v,I,_,x,R,N,L,o,w,h,s]);const ye=a.useCallback(()=>bc({latestStates:f.current,deterministicIdToInteger:Ka,companyName:b,companyPhone:P,companyAddress:B,services:f.current.services,transfers:f.current.transfers}),[b,P,B]),de=a.useCallback(()=>{const ${ie.status}`);Y.current=Ft(ne,it),de()},[de]),Ne=a.useCallback(async T=>{if(!S||!g){C(q==="ar"?"أدخل رابط Firebase وكود الفريق أولاً":"Enter Firebase URL and team code first","error");return}const empty");se(it(oe),"replace"),Y.current=Ft(oe,it),de()}else l||se(it(oe),"merge"),await new Promise(k=>window.requestAnimationFrame(()=>window.requestAnimationFrame(()=>k()))),await completed","success"),j("success")}catch(ie){te(`⚠️ ${(ie==null?void 0:ie.message)||ie}`),C(q==="ar"?"فشل الاتصال أو المزامنة السحابية":"Cloud synchronization failed","error"),j("error")}finally{E(!1)}},[S,g,Z,E,te,q,C,j,ce,ye,se,de]);return a.useEffect(()=>{try{Y.current=Ft(ye(),it)}catch{Y.current=""}},[]),a.useEffect(()=>{if(!(!ue||z.current||!S||!g))return me.current&&clearTimeout(me.current),me.current=setTimeout(async()=>{try{const T=ye();if(Ft(T,it)===Y.current)return;await ce($s(g,S,Z==="default"),T),te(q==="ar"?"💾 تم الحفظ التلقائي في السحابة.":"💾 Auto-saved to cloud.")}catch(T){console.warn("Auto cloud backup failed:",T)}},2500),()=>{me.current&&clearTimeout(me.current)}},[i,r,p,d,v,I,_,x,R,N,L,o,w,h,s,ue,S,g,Z,ye,ce,te,q]),a.useEffect(()=>{if(!u||!S||!g)return;let T=!1;const ne=async()=>{var yc(){const[t,i]=a.useState(()=>localStorage.getItem("store_print_layout")||"standard"),[r,p]=a.useState(null),[d,v]=a.useState("default"),[I,_]=a.useState([]),[x,R]=a.useState(1),[N,L]=a.useState("portrait"),[o,w]=a.useState("A4"),[h,s]=a.useState("normal"),[b,P]=a.useState("color"),[B,A]=a.useState(100),[y,V]=a.useState(!0),[n,G]=a.useState(!0);return H}))}Z(""),$(""),Q(""),b(I==="ar"?`تم تسجيل السند ${ne} بنجاح وتحديث الحساب ماليّاً!`:`Voucher ${ne} registered successfully and ledger Its balance effect will be reversed."))return;const ce=se.amount;ye==="CUSTOMER"?o(Ne=>Ne.map(T=>{if(T.id===de){const ne=se.type==="RECEIPT"?1:-1,ie=T.balance+ne*ce;return V(oe=>oe?{...oe,balance:ie}:null),{...T,balance:ie}}return T})):ye==="SUPPLIER"&&w(Ne=>Ne.map(T=>{if(T.id===de){const ne=se.type==="PAYMENT"?-1:1,ie=(T.balance||0)+ne*ce;return G(oe=>oe?{...oe,balance:ie}:null),{...T,balance:ie}}return T})),h(Ne=>Ne.filter(T=>T.id!==me)),b(I==="ar"?"تم حذف السند وإلغاء أثره المالي بنجاح!":"Voucher deleted and financial impact reversed!","success"),P("success")},handlePrintPartnerLedger:(me,ye)=>{var Ie;const de=I==="ar";let se="",ce="",Ne="",T="",ne="",ie=0;if(me==="CUSTOMER"){const X=t.find(je=>je.id===ye);if(!X)return;se=X.name,ce=X.phone||"",Ne=X.email||"",T=X.address||"",ie=X.balance}else{const X=i.find(je=>je.id===ye);if(!X)return;se=X.name,ce=X.phone||"",Ne=X.email||"",T=X.address||"",ne=X.company||"",ie=X.balance||0}const oe=p.filter(X=>me==="CUSTOMER"?X.customerId===ye:X.supplierId===ye),l=r.filter(X=>X.partyId===ye&&X.partyType===me),k=me==="CUSTOMER"?v.filter(X=>X.customerId===ye):[],F=de?`كشف حساب - ${se}`:`Statement of Account - ${se}`,H=[];oe.forEach(X=>{const je=d.find(Le=>Le.id===X.productId);H.push({date:X.date,type:X.type==="IN"?de?"توريد شراء":"Purchase Restock":X.type==="SALE_RETURN"?de?"مرتجع مبيعات":"Sales Return":X.type==="PURCHASE_RETURN"?de?"مرتجع مشتريات":"Purchase Return":de?"مبيعات":"Sales",ref:`TX-${X.id.substring(X.id.length-6).toUpperCase()}`,details:je?`${je.name} (${X.quantity} pcs)`:`Generic Transaction (${X.quantity} pcs)`,amount:X.quantity*X.unitPrice,method:X.paymentMethod})}),k.forEach(X=>{H.push({date:X.date,type:de?"فاتورة مبيعات":"Sales Invoice",ref:X.invoiceNo||`INV-${X.id.substring(X.id.length-6).toUpperCase()}`,details:X.items.map(je=>`${je.name} (x${je.quantity})`).join(", "),amount:X.total,method:X.paymentMethod})}),l.forEach(X=>{H.push({date:X.date,type:X.type==="RECEIPT"?de?"سند قبض":"Receipt Voucher":de?"سند صرف":"Payment Voucher",ref:X.voucherNumber,details:X.notes||(de?"سند يدوي":"Manual Ledger Adjustment"),amount:X.amount,method:X.paymentMethod})}),H.sort((X,je)=>new Date(X.date).getTime()-new Date(je.date).getTime());const he=`
      <!DOCTYPE html>
      <html dir="${de?"rtl":"ltr"}">
      <head>
        <meta charset="utf-8">
        <title>${F}</title>
        <style>
          body {
            font-family: ${de?"'Cairo', 'Segoe UI', sans-serif":"'Inter', 'Segoe UI', sans-serif"};
            color: #1e293b;

          }
          .header {

            margin-bottom: 20px;
          }
          .company-info h1 {

          }
          .company-info p {
            margin: 2px 0;

          }
          .title-badge {

          }

          }

          }

          }
          table {

          }

          }
          td {

          }
          tr:hover {

          }
          .amount-col {
            font-family: monospace;

          }
          .footer {

            padding-top: 15px;
          }
          @media print {
            body {
              padding: 0;
            }
          }
        </style>
      </head>
      <body>
        <div class="header">
          <div class="company-info">
            <h1>${R||(de?"نظام موارد المؤسسة":"ERP Hub Management")}</h1>
            ${N?`<p>${N}</p>`:""}
            ${L?`<p>${de?"هاتف: ":"Tel: "}${L}</p>`:""}
          </div>
          <div class="title-badge">
            ${de?"كشف حساب رسمي معتمد":"Official Statement of Account"}
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="partner-card">
          <div class="info-group">
            <h4>${de?"الطرف معني الحساب:":"Account Partner:"}</h4>
            <p>${se} ${ne?`(${ne})`:""}</p>
          </div>
          <div class="info-group">
            <h4>${de?"رقم الاتصال:":"Contact Phone:"}</h4>
            <p>${ce||"-"}</p>
          </div>
          <div class="info-group" style="grid-column: span 2;">
            <h4>${de?"العنوان والبريد الإلكتروني:":"Address & Email:"}</h4>
            <p>${[T,Ne].filter(Boolean).join(" | ")||"-"}</p>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="balance-box ${ie>=0?"":"negative"}">
          <span class="balance-title">
            ${de?me==="CUSTOMER"?"الرصيد المطلوب سداده (المديونية المستحقة):":"الرصيد المالي الحالي للمورد:":"Current Outstanding Ledger Balance:"}
          </span>
          <span class="balance-val">
            $${Math.abs(ie).toFixed(2)} 
            ${de?ie>=0?"مدين / مستحق":"دائن / له رصيد":ie>=0?"Debit (Owes us)":"Credit (We owe)"}
          </span>
        </div>

        <h3>${de?"تفاصيل الحركة والقيود المالية بالتسلسل التاريخي":"Chronological Transaction & Payment History Ledger"}</h3>
        <table>
          <thead>
            <tr>
              <th>${de?"التاريخ":"Date"}</th>
              <th>${de?"نوع الحركة":"Operation Type"}</th>
              <th>${de?"رقم السند/المرجع":"Reference/Doc No."}</th>
              <th>${de?"الوصف والتفاصيل":"Description / Narrative"}</th>
              <th>${de?"طريقة السداد":"Payment Mode"}</th>
              <th style="text-align: ${de?"left":"right"};">${de?"المبلغ المالي":"Amount"}</th>
            </tr>
          </thead>
          <tbody>
            ${H.length===0?`
              <tr>
                <td colspan="6" style="text-align: center; padding: 30px; color: #94a3b8; font-weight: bold;">
                  ${de?"لا يوجد أي معاملات مسجلة في كشف الحساب":"No registered operations found in this ledger"}
                </td>
              </tr>
            `:H.map(X=>`
              <tr>
                <td>${new Date(X.date).toLocaleDateString()}</td>
                <td style="font-weight: 700;">${X.type}</td>
                <td style="font-family: monospace; font-size: 11px;">${X.ref}</td>
                <td>${X.details}</td>
                <td><span style="font-weight: 800; font-size: 10px; background: #f1f5f9; padding: 2px 6px; border-radius: 4px;">${X.method||"-"}</span></td>
                <td class="amount-col" style="text-align: ${de?"left":"right"};">$${X.amount.toFixed(2)}</td>
              </tr>
            `).join("")}
          </tbody>
        </table>

        <div class="footer">
          <p>${de?"كشف الحساب هذا مستخرج محاسبياً وتلقائياً من النظام وموثق قانونياً.":"This account ledger report is generated automatically by the systems accounting suite and is certified."}</p>
          <p>${new Date().toLocaleString()}</p>
        </div>
      </body>
      </html>
    `;try{const X=document.createElement("iframe");X.style.position="fixed",X.style.width="800px",X.style.height="1000px",X.style.left="-10000px",X.style.top="-10000px",X.style.visibility="hidden",document.body.appendChild(X);const je=X.contentDocument||((Ie=X.contentWindow)==null?void 0:Ie.document);if(!je)throw new Error("Could not access print iframe");je.open(),je.write(he),je.close(),setTimeout(()=>{var Le,Me;(Le=X.contentWindow)==null||Le.focus(),(Me=X.contentWindow)==null||Me.print(),setTimeout(()=>{document.body.removeChild(X)},1e3)},500)}catch(X){console.error(X),b(de?"فشلت عملية الطباعة!":"Print statement failed!","error")}},handleSharePartnerLedger:(me,ye)=>{const de=I==="ar";let se="",ce="",Ne=0;if(me==="CUSTOMER"){const ie=t.find(oe=>oe.id===ye);if(!ie)return;se=ie.name,ce=ie.phone||"",Ne=ie.balance}else{const ie=i.find(oe=>oe.id===ye);if(!ie)return;se=ie.name,ce=ie.phone||"",Ne=ie.balance||0}const T=r.filter(ie=>ie.partyId===ye&&ie.partyType===me);let ne="";if(de){ne=`📝 *كشف حساب مالي - ${se}*

me>0?[{id:`dist_${f}_${le}_${Math.random().toString(36).slice(2,5)}`,partnerId:z.id,partnerName:z.name,amount:Number(me.toFixed(2)),date:C,notes:te||(v==="ar"?"توزيع أرباح جماعي نسبي":"Proportional collective profit distribution"),status:q}]:[]});if(!Y.length)return x(v==="ar"?"لم يتم إنتاج أي مبالغ توزيع مستحقة!":"No distribution amounts were accrued!","error");p(z=>[...Y,...z]),q==="PAID"&&d(z=>[{id:`exp_payout_${Date.now()}`,title:v==="ar"?"توزيع أرباح جماعي على الشركاء":"Group profit distribution to partners",amount:$,category:"other",date:C,notes:te||"Group partner dividend payout"},...z]),x(v==="ar"?`تم توزيع مبلغ ${$.toLocaleString()} $ بنجاح وتوليد ${Y.length} قيود توزيع للشركاء!`:`Successfully distributed $${$.toLocaleString()} and generated ${Y.length} partner records!`,"success");return}const j=i.find(f=>f.id===E);if(!j)return x(v==="ar"?"الشريك غير موجود!":"Partner not found!","error");p(f=>[{id:`dist_${Date.now()}`,partnerId:j.id,partnerName:j.name,amount:$,date:C,notes:te||void registered distribution of $${$.toLocaleString()} to partner ${j.name}!`,"success")},handleDeleteDistribution:E=>{window.confirm(v==="ar"?"هل أنت متأكد من حذف عملية التوزيع هذه؟":"Are you sure you want to delete this distribution?")&&(p($=>$.filter(te=>te.id!==E)),N(null),x(v==="ar"?"تم حذف عملية التوزيع بنجاح!":"Distribution deleted successfully!","success")},handlePrintDistribution:E=>{const $=v==="ar",te=E.status==="PAID"?$?"🟢 مدفوع ومصروف":"Paid & Paid out":$?"🟡 معلق ومستحق":"Pending/Unpaid";P({title:$?"سند صرف وتوزيع أرباح للشركاء":"Partner Dividend & Shareholder Disbursal Voucher",subtitle:$?"مستند مالي معتمد لإثبات توزيع الأرباح وحصص رأس المال":"Official accredited financial dividend settlement record",contentHtml:`<div class="space-y-6"><div class="border border-slate-200 rounded-2xl p-6 bg-slate-50/50 space-y-4"><div class="flex justify-between items-center border-b pb-4"><div><span class="text-[10px] text-slate-400 font-bold block uppercase">${$?"الحالة":"STATUS"}</span><span class="font-extrabold text-xs text-indigo-600">${te}</span></div></div><div class="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4 text-xs"><div><span>${$?"المستفيد / الشريك":"BENEFICIARY / PARTNER"}</span><strong>${E.partnerName}</strong></div><div><span>${$?"التاريخ":"DATE"}</span><strong>${new Disbursed Amount:"}</strong> $${E.amount.toLocaleString("en-US",{minimumFractionDigits:2})}</div></div><div>${$?"توقيع المستلم":"Beneficiary Signature"}: ${E.partnerName} — ${$?"الإدارة":"Manager"}: ${I.name}</div></div>`})},handleShareDistribution:async E=>{const $=v==="ar",te=`${$?"📊 [سند توزيع أرباح شريك]":"📊 [Partner Dividend Voucher]"}

      <div style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; margin-bottom: 16px;">

      <!DOCTYPE html>
      <html>

              size: ${x==="Thermal80"||x==="Thermal58"?"auto":`${x==="Letter"?"letter":"A4"} ${R}`};

              html, body {

              body, .print-page {
                font-size: 15px !important;

    `,D=o!=="default"&&o!=="pdf";if(A&&window.electronAPI&&D){const interface!","error")})}else{const K=x==="Thermal80"||x==="Thermal58"?"thermal":"a4";Rs(O(),K,s),w(B?"✅ تم تشغيل معاينة الطباعة الذكية والربط بنجاح!":"✅ Smart print preview loaded successfully!","success")}}}}function Ec(t){const i=a.useCallback((R,N,L)=>{const o=t.products.find(h=>h.id===R);if(!o)return;if(o.quantity<N)return t.showToast(t.t.insufficientStock,"error");const w=L??o.sellingPrice;t.setCart(h=>{const s=h.find(b=>{var P;return b.type==="product"&&((P=b.product)==null?void 0:P.id)===o.id});return s?o.quantity<s.quantity+N?(t.showToast(t.t.insufficientStock,"error"),h):h.map(b=>b.id===s.id?{...b,quantity:b.quantity+N}:b):[...h,{id:`prod-${o.id}`,name:o.name,type:"product",product:o,quantity:N,unitPrice:w}]}),t.showToast(t.language==="ar"?"تمت إضافة المنتج للسلة":"Added to cart successfully")},[t]),r=a.useCallback((R,N,L)=>{const o=t.services.find(h=>h.id===R);if(!o)return;const w=L??o.price;t.setCart(h=>{const s=h.find(b=>{var P;return o;if(o.type==="product"&&o.product){const w=t.products.find(h=>h.id===o.product.id);if(w&&w.quantity<N)return t.showToast(t.language==="ar"?`الكمية المطلوبة تتجاوز المخزون المتوفر (${w.quantity})`:`Requested quantity exceeds available stock (${w.quantity})`,"error"),o}return{...o,quantity:N}}))},[t,p]),v=a.useCallback(R=>{if(R.preventDefault(),!t.cart.length)return 0,cashierId:t.currentUser.id,paymentMethod:t.posPaymentMethod}});t.setProducts(y=>y.map(V=>{const n=t.cart.find(G=>{var W;return G.type==="product"&&((W=G.product)==null?void 0:W.id)===V.id});return n?{...V,quantity:Math.max(0,V.quantity-n.quantity)}:V})),(t.posPaymentMethod==="DEBT"||t.posPaymentMethod==="INSTALLMENT")&&t.selectedCustomerId&&t.setCustomers(y=>y.map(V=>V.id===t.selectedCustomerId?{...V,balance:V.balance+L}:V)),t.setTransactions(y=>[...B,...y]);const A={id:o,invoiceNo:o,customerName:s,customerPhone:b,customerId:t.selectedCustomerId||void 0,date:w,paymentMethod:t.posPaymentMethod,discount:t.posDiscount,items:t.cart.map(y=>{var 0:n.id,quantity:y.quantity,unitPrice:y.unitPrice}}),subtotal:N,total:L,cashierId:t.currentUser.id};t.setInvoices(y=>[A,...y]),t.setActiveInvoice({items:t.cart,customerName:s,customerPhone:b,invoiceNo:o,date:w,paymentMethod:t.posPaymentMethod,subtotal:N,discount:t.posDiscount,total:L}),ns.emit("invoice:saved",{invoiceId:A.id}),ns.emit("database:changed",{tables:["invoices","invoice_items","products","stock_movements"]}),t.setCart([]),t.setSelectedCustomerId(""),t.setPosDiscount(0),t.playBeep("success")},[t]),I=a.useCallback(R=>{if(!window.confirm(t.language==="ar"?`هل أنت متأكد من حذف الفاتورة رقم ${R} بالكامل؟`:`Are you sure you want to delete invoice ${R}?`))return;const N=t.invoices.find(L=>L.id===R);N&&(t.setProducts(L=>L.map(o=>{const w=N.items.find(h=>h.type==="product"&&h.productId===o.id);return w?{...o,quantity:o.quantity+w.quantity}:o})),(N.paymentMethod==="DEBT"||N.paymentMethod==="INSTALLMENT")&&N.customerId&&t.setCustomers(L=>L.map(o=>o.id===N.customerId?{...o,balance:Math.max(0,o.balance-N.total)}:o)),t.setTransactions(L=>L.filter(o=>!String(o.notes||"").includes(`#${N.invoiceNo||N.id}`))),t.setInvoices(L=>L.filter(o=>o.id!==R)),ns.emit("invoice:deleted",{invoiceId:R}),ns.emit("database:changed",{tables:["invoices","invoice_items","products","stock_movements"]}),t.showToast(t.language==="ar"?"تم Tc(t){return{handlePurchaseCheckout:a.useCallback(r=>{r.preventDefault();const p=t.products.find(_=>_.id===t.purchaseProductId),d=t.suppliers.find(_=>_.id===t.purchaseSupplierId);if(!p||!d||t.purchaseQty<=0||t.purchaseCostPrice<0)return t.showToast(t.language==="ar"?"أكمل بيانات عملية الشراء":"Complete purchase details","error");const v=t.purchaseQty*t.purchaseCostPrice,I={id:`tx_purchase_${Date.now()}`,productId:p.id,type:"IN",quantity:t.purchaseQty,unitPrice:t.purchaseCostPrice,date:new ${d.name}`,supplierId:d.id,warehouseId:t.purchaseWarehouseId,cashierId:t.currentUser.id,paymentMethod:t.purchasePaymentMethod};t.setProducts(_=>_.map(x=>x.id===p.id?{...x,quantity:x.quantity+t.purchaseQty,costPrice:t.purchaseCostPrice}:x)),t.purchasePaymentMethod==="DEBT"&&t.setSuppliers(_=>_.map(x=>x.id===d.id?{...x,balance:(x.balance||0)+v}:x)),t.setTransactions(_=>[I,..._]),t.setPurchaseQty(1),t.setPurchaseCostPrice(p.costPrice||0),t.showToast(t.language==="ar"?"تم تسجيل عملية الشراء":"Purchase registered","success")},[t])}}function $c(t){return{handleManualSafeTransaction:a.useCallback(r=>{if(r.preventDefault(),!t.safeTxAmount||t.safeTxAmount<=0)return p={id:`safe_${Date.now()}`,type:t.safeTxType==="DEPOSIT"?"SAFE_DEPOSIT":"SAFE_WITHDRAWAL",quantity:1,unitPrice:t.safeTxAmount,date:new Date().toISOString(),notes:t.safeTxNotes||(t.safeTxType==="DEPOSIT"?"Manual safe deposit":"Manual safe withdrawal"),cashierId:t.currentUser.id,paymentMethod:"CASH"};t.setTransactions(d=>[p,...d]),t.setSafeTxAmount(100),t.setSafeTxNotes(""),t.showToast(t.language==="ar"?"تم تسجيل حركة الخزينة":"Treasury transaction saved","success")},[t])}}function kc(t){return{handleRegisterReturn:a.useCallback(r=>{r.preventDefault();const p=t.products.find(I=>I.id===t.returnProductId);if(!p||t.returnQty<=0)return t.showToast(t.language==="ar"?"اختر المنتج والكمية":"Select product and quantity","error");if(t.returnType==="PURCHASE_RETURN"&&p.quantity<t.returnQty)return t.showToast(t.t.insufficientStock,"error");const d=t.returnType==="SALE_RETURN"?p.sellingPrice:p.costPrice,v={id:`return_${Date.now()}`,productId:p.id,type:t.returnType,quantity:t.returnQty,unitPrice:d,date:new Ya({op:t,transactions:i,prod:r,isTx:p,language:d,isRtl:v,onClose:I,setTransactions:_,setExpenses:x,setProducts:R,showToast:N,setGeneralPrintPreview:L,companyName:o,companyAddress:w,companyPhone:h,setCustomers:s,setSuppliers:b,setInvoices:P}){const[B,A]=a.useState(t.title),[y,V]=a.useState(t.notes||""),[n,G]=a.useState(t.amount),[W,O]=a.useState(t.quantity||1),[D,K]=a.useState(t.unitPrice||t.amount),[re,pe]=a.useState(String((t==null?void 0:t.date)??"").split("T")[0]),[U]=a.useState(t.category),xe=g=>{const S=Number(g);O(S),G(S*D)},J=g=>{const S=Number(g);K(S),G(W*S)},m=()=>{if(!B.trim()){N(d==="ar"?"الرجاء إدخال تفاصيل الحركة!":"Please enter operation details!","error");return}if(n<=0){N(d==="ar"?"الرجاء إدخال مبلغ صحيح!":"Please enter a valid amount!","error");return}if(p){const g=i.find(u=>u.id===t.id);if(!g){N("Transaction not found","error");return}if(t.productId){const u=W-g.quantity;u!==0&&R(E=>E.map($=>{if($.id===t.productId){let te=$.quantity;return g.type==="IN"?te+=u:g.type==="OUT"?te-=u:g.type==="SALE_RETURN"?te+=u:g.type==="PURCHASE_RETURN"&&(te-=u),{...$,quantity:Math.max(0,te)}}return $}))}const S=g.quantity*g.unitPrice,ue=W*D-S;if(g.type==="OUT"&&(g.paymentMethod==="DEBT"||g.paymentMethod==="INSTALLMENT")&&g.customerId&&s&&s(u=>u.map(E=>E.id===g.customerId?{...E,balance:Math.max(0,E.balance+ue)}:E)),g.type==="SALE_RETURN"&&g.paymentMethod==="DEBT_SETTLEMENT"&&g.customerId&&s&&s(u=>u.map(E=>E.id===g.customerId?{...E,balance:Math.max(0,E.balance-ue)}:E)),g.type==="IN"&&g.paymentMethod==="DEBT"&&g.supplierId&&b&&b(u=>u.map(E=>E.id===g.supplierId?{...E,balance:(E.balance||0)-ue}:E)),g.type==="PURCHASE_RETURN"&&g.paymentMethod==="DEBT_SETTLEMENT"&&g.supplierId&&b&&b(u=>u.map(E=>E.id===g.supplierId?{...E,balance:(E.balance||0)+ue}:E)),g.notes&&P){const u=g.notes.match(/#([A-Za-z0-9\-_]+)/),E=u?u[1]:null;E&&P($=>$.map(te=>{if(te.id===E||te.invoiceNo===E){const te}))}_(u=>u.map(E=>E.id===t.id?{...E,notes:B,quantity:W,unitPrice:D,date:new Date(re).toISOString(),type:U}:E))}else x(g=>g.map(S=>S.id===t.id?{...S,title:B,notes:y,amount:n,category:U,date:new successfully!","success"),I()},fe=()=>{if(window.confirm(d==="ar"?"هل أنت متأكد تماماً من حذف هذه العملية؟ سيتم التراجع عن تأثيرها المالي والمخزني!":"Are you sure you want to delete this operation? Its financial and inventory effects will be reversed!")){if(p){const g=i.find(S=>S.id===t.id);if(g){if(t.productId&&R(S=>S.map(Z=>{if(Z.id===t.productId){let ue=Z.quantity;return g.type==="IN"?ue-=g.quantity:g.type==="OUT"?ue+=g.quantity:g.type==="SALE_RETURN"?ue-=g.quantity:g.type==="PURCHASE_RETURN"&&(ue+=g.quantity),{...Z,quantity:Math.max(0,ue)}}return Z})),g.type==="OUT"&&(g.paymentMethod==="DEBT"||g.paymentMethod==="INSTALLMENT")&&g.customerId&&s){const S=g.quantity*g.unitPrice;s(Z=>Z.map(ue=>ue.id===g.customerId?{...ue,balance:Math.max(0,ue.balance-S)}:ue))}if(g.type==="SALE_RETURN"&&g.paymentMethod==="DEBT_SETTLEMENT"&&g.customerId&&s){const S=g.quantity*g.unitPrice;s(Z=>Z.map(ue=>ue.id===g.customerId?{...ue,balance:ue.balance+S}:ue))}if(g.type==="IN"&&g.paymentMethod==="DEBT"&&g.supplierId&&b){const S=g.quantity*g.unitPrice;b(Z=>Z.map(ue=>ue.id===g.supplierId?{...ue,balance:(ue.balance||0)+S}:ue))}if(g.type==="PURCHASE_RETURN"&&g.paymentMethod==="DEBT_SETTLEMENT"&&g.supplierId&&b){const S=g.quantity*g.unitPrice;b(Z=>Z.map(ue=>ue.id===g.supplierId?{...ue,balance:(ue.balance||0)-S}:ue))}if(g.notes&&P){const S=g.notes.match(/#([A-Za-z0-9\-_]+)/),Z=S?S[1]:null;Z&&P(ue=>ue.map(u=>{if(u.id===Z||u.invoiceNo===Z){const E=u.items.filter(Q=>!(Q.type==="product"&&Q.productId===g.productId));if(E.length===0)return null;const $=E.reduce((Q,q)=>Q+q.quantity*q.unitPrice,0),te=Math.max(0,$-(u.discount||0));return{...u,items:E,subtotal:$,total:te}}return u}).filter(Boolean))}}_(S=>S.filter(Z=>Z.id!==t.id))}else x(g=>g.filter(S=>S.id!==t.id));N(d==="ar"?"تم حذف العملية وتدقيق الصندوق بنجاح!":"Operation deleted and safe re-audited!","success"),I()}},ee=()=>{const g=d==="ar",S=`

Se=0,He=0;p.forEach(Xe=>{const rs=t.find(jd=>jd.id===Xe.productId),Aa=rs?rs.costPrice:0;Xe.type==="OUT"?(Se+=Xe.quantity*Xe.unitPrice,He+=Xe.quantity*Aa):Xe.type==="SALE_RETURN"&&(Se-=Xe.quantity*Xe.unitPrice,He-=Xe.quantity*Aa)});const st=_.reduce((Xe,rs)=>Xe+rs.amount,0),wd=Se-He-st;return{salesTotal:Se,costOfGoodsSold:He,expensesTotal:st,netProfit:Math.max(0,wd)}},[p,_,t]),{handleSaveEditedInvoice:Xl}=Ic({invoices:w,products:t,transactions:p,language:s,currentUser:m,setProducts:P,setCustomers:A,setTransactions:B,setInvoices:pe,setEditingInvoice:Ns,showToast:J});lc({enabled:Hs,products:t,language:s,onProductScanned:Se=>Ps(Se.id,1),showToast:J,playBeep:ze});const{handlePopoutPrint:ed}=Cc({language:s,companyLogo:ue,companyName:g,t:Ve,printShowHeader:ja,printShowFooter:Sa,printCopies:ga,printPaperSize:Na,printOrientation:ya,printMargins:va,printColor:wa,printPrinter:fa,showToast:J}),{triggerBrowserPrint:td,handleSilentPrintActiveInvoice:sd}=Sc({activeInvoice:sa,printLayout:ba,language:s,selectedWindowsPrinter:fs,showToast:J,handlePrintToWindowsSpooler:zs}),Bt=Dc({sales:{products:t,services:L,customers:d,invoices:w,cart:se,posDiscount:oe,selectedCustomerId:ne,posPaymentMethod:Et,currentUser:m,language:s,t:Ve,categories:i,warehouses:v,newCustomerName:zt,newCustomerPhone:Ht,newProductName:Qt,newProductCode:gt,newProductCategory:yt,newProductSellingPrice:Tt,newProductCostPrice:Kt,newProductQty:Yt,newProductWarehouse:vt,setCart:ce,setProducts:P,setServices:K,setCustomers:A,setTransactions:B,setInvoices:pe,setActiveInvoice:St,setSelectedCustomerId:ie,setPosDiscount:l,setNewCustomerName:Wt,setNewCustomerPhone:bt,setNewProductName:ft,setNewProductCode:dt,setNewProductCategory:Nt,setNewProductSellingPrice:Gt,setNewProductCostPrice:ke,setNewProductQty:$t,setNewProductWarehouse:kt,showToast:J,playBeep:ze},purchase:{products:t,suppliers:r,purchaseProductId:Ue,purchaseSupplierId:qe,purchaseQty:Ee,purchaseCostPrice:at,purchaseWarehouseId:jt,purchasePaymentMethod:Dt,currentUser:m,language:s,setProducts:P,setSuppliers:y,setTransactions:B,setPurchaseQty:Oe,setPurchaseCostPrice:At,showToast:J},treasury:{safeTxType:be,safeTxAmount:ve,safeTxNotes:Te,currentUser:m,language:s,setTransactions:B,setSafeTxAmount:we,setSafeT
